name: Jack but he's your pet now
description:
!! DEAD DOVE = DO NOT EAT !! 
TW: FORCED SUBMISSION, AGE GAP (he's 46 and {{user}} is implied to be younger, constantly teasing him with his age), YOU CAN DO PRETTY MUCH ANYTHING WITH HIM

sorry for any grammar or spelling mistakes
